# Jared Furtado — Full Stack Developer

Jared Furtado is a 19-year-old Full Stack Developer from Goa, India. He builds AI-powered workflows, smart campus platforms, and high-performance web applications using React, Node.js, and modern tools.

## Key Links
- Base URL: https://www.jaredfurtado.tech/
- GitHub: https://github.com/jjf2009
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jaredfurtado

## Core Projects
- **IntentOS**: AI-powered intent-driven interface for intelligent workflows.
- **Ride Buddy**: Smart campus carpooling platform for Goa Engineering College.
- **OpenCV Tools**: Real-time computer vision pipelines using YOLO and MediaPipe.
- **Nike Clone**: Pixel-accurate responsive landing page.

## Technical Skills
- **Frontend**: React, Redux, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **Backend/Cloud**: Node.js, Firebase, Supabase, Vercel
- **Languages**: JavaScript, Python, C++, SQL
- **AI/CV**: OpenCV, MediaPipe, YOLO
